heading: No antitrust immunity or defenses
label: 12007 No antitrust immunity or defenses
text: Nothing in this chapter shall be deemed to convey to any person, partnership, corporation, or other entity immunity from civil or criminal liability under any antitrust law or to create defenses to actions under any antitrust law. As used in this section, “antitrust laws” means those Acts set forth in .section 12 of title 15
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , known as the Renewable Energy and Energy Efficiency Technology Competitiveness Act of 1989, which is classified principally to this chapter.
